title: How Alibaba Cloud's Intelligent Pin Trading Station revitalises a century-old Olympic tradition - TNT Sports
description: Through its Intelligent Pin Trading Station, Alibaba Cloud has re-imagined the beloved Olympic Games tradition of pin trading.
